docs.title: Bifrost Platform
docs.text: AI-native environment governance control plane — separate from the trade monitoring UI.

docs.title: Related handbook
docs.text:
Deployment, hardware roadmap, Goal, and migration sign-off live in the infra handbook:

http://127.0.0.1:8050/ — run ./scripts/start_docs.sh in bifrost-trade-infra

docs.title: This site
docs.text: Topic Document Repo overview Overview Control plane vs data plane Architecture L0 probe contract Trade contract Node agent (Phase B) Agent MCP tools (Phase P2) MCP

docs.title: Run the console
docs.text: make start    # platform-api :8780 + console :5180

docs.title: Control plane vs data plane
docs.text:
flowchart TB
  subgraph platform [bifrost-platform]
    Console[console :5180]
    API[api Go :8780]
    MCP[mcp Phase P2]
    Agent[agent Phase B]
  end
  subgraph trade [bifrost-trade data plane]
    FE[trade-frontend :5173]
    APIs[9 FastAPI domains]
    Worker[daemon + celery]
    Socket[IB + Massive edge]
  end
  Console --> API
  MCP --> API
  Agent --> API
  API -->|"L0 probe only"| APIs
  API -->|"TCP"| PGRedis[PG + Redis]
  FE --> APIs
  Worker --> Socket

docs.title: Authorization levels
docs.text: Level Platform behavior L0 Read-only probes (Phase 0 default) L1 Safe retries via trade Ops API (future) L2 Owner-confirmed changes (future) forbidden Trade write paths — never exposed to platform AI

docs.title: Ports
docs.text: Service Port platform-api 8780 platform-console 5180 bifrost-trade-frontend 5173

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text:
Environment registry: config/environments.yaml

Optional Ops token env vars for capabilities probe — see .env.example.

docs.title: Related
docs.text:
• TRADE_CONTRACT.md
  • bifrost-trade-infra Goal/AI_NATIVE_OPS_PLATFORM.md

docs.title: Trade stack read-only contract
docs.text: bifrost-platform aggregates health from the existing Bifrost Trade stack. It does not embed bifrost-trade-api or change response shapes.

docs.title: HTTP probes (via nginx)
docs.text:
Aligned with bifrost-trade-infra/scripts/check_prod_stack.sh:

Target ID Path OK codes nginx-spa / 200 api-monitor /api/monitor/status 200, 503 api-massive /api/massive/research/massive/health 200, 503 api-docs /api/docs/research/docs/health 200, 503 api-ops /api/ops/health 200, 503 api-trading /api/trading/health 200, 503 api-strategy /api/strategy/health 200, 503 api-portfolio /api/portfolio/health 200, 503 api-market /api/market/health 200, 503 api-research /api/research/health 200, 503

docs.title: Auth probe
docs.text:
Target ID Path Token ops-capabilities /api/ops/ops/auth/capabilities BIFROST_{DEV,PROD}_OPS_TOKEN optional

Response shape matches bifrost_api.ops.auth capabilities payload (identity, capabilities.can_operate).

docs.title: TCP probes
docs.text: Target ID Address source postgres environments.yaml postgres host:port redis environments.yaml redis host:port

docs.title: Policy-blocked rows (always shown)
docs.text: Target ID Reason ib-operator-rpc Trade write path — R-DV3 daemon-control-write Platform L0 does not invoke control writes

docs.title: Topology API
docs.text:
GET /api/v1/topology?env=dev|prod merges:

  • Static graph: config/topology.yaml (nodes, edges, Compose/K3s roles)
  • Dynamic status: same probes as /api/v1/matrix for the selected environment

Edit topology.yaml when hardware or K3s rollout changes; set deployment_phase to compose | k3s_partial | k3s_ha.

docs.title: Versioning
docs.text: Phase 0: informal contract documented here. Breaking changes to trade health URLs must update api/internal/probe/probe.go and this file together.

docs.title: bifrost-platform
docs.text:
AI-native environment governance control plane for Bifrost Trade.

Manage and monitor Development and Production environments through a dedicated Utility Console. The trade monitoring UI (bifrost-trade-frontend) remains separate.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Go 1.22+ — brew install go (macOS Apple Silicon: /opt/homebrew/bin/go)
  • Node 20+ — for console/ (npm install in console/)

docs.title: Quick start
docs.text:
# 0. API deps (first time)
cd api && go mod tidy && go test ./...
# Build binary: cd api && make build   (not bare `go build` — main is in cmd/platform-api)

# 1. Optional: copy env for Ops capabilities probe
cp .env.example .env

# 2. Console deps (first time)
cd console && npm install && cd ..

# 3. Start platform (frees :8780 / :5180 if occupied, then runs API + Console)
./scripts/run_platform.py
# or: make start

# Console: http://127.0.0.1:5180
# API:     http://127.0.0.1:8780/health

With the trade dev stack running (cd ../bifrost-trade-infra && make dev), the matrix should show green reachability for local nginx + APIs.

curl -s 'http://127.0.0.1:8780/api/v1/matrix?env=dev' | jq .
curl -s 'http://127.0.0.1:8780/api/v1/topology?env=prod' | jq .

Edit network layout in config/topology.yaml (hosts, edges, K3s roles). Console Topology tab shows live status.

docs.title: Layout
docs.text:
api/       Go control-plane API (:8780)
console/   React Utility UI (:5180) — Dense UI token style
agent/     Node agent (Phase B placeholder)
mcp/       MCP tools (Phase P2 placeholder)
config/    environments.yaml — dev + prod registration
docs/      Architecture and trade-stack contract

docs.title: Design principles
docs.text:
• Polyglot backend (Go for platform API); unified human UX (Dense UI CSS tokens)
  • Read-only Phase 0 — connectivity + auth matrix (L0); no trade write paths
  • Probe, don't duplicate — aggregate health from existing trade stack endpoints

docs.title: Related repos
docs.text:
Repo Role bifrost-trade-infra Business Compose, Goal docs bifrost-trade-frontend Trade monitoring SPA bifrost-trade-api Business APIs (probed read-only)

See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and Goal/AI_NATIVE_OPS_PLATFORM.md.

docs.title: bifrost-platform agent (Phase B)
docs.text: Lightweight Go node agent deployed on Linux mini-pcs, Mac Minis, and GPU server.

docs.title: Planned responsibilities
docs.text: Capability Description Host facts CPU, memory, disk, uptime Docker read-only Container list / health via local socket (no trade writes) K8s watch Node and pod status after K3s bootstrap Heartbeat Register with platform-api for discovery

docs.title: Phase 0
docs.text: Not implemented. Connectivity matrix probes run from platform-api centrally.

docs.title: Security
docs.text:
• Agent credentials are separate from trade Ops tokens
  • No access to ib:operator:cmd or daemon_control write paths

docs.title: bifrost-platform MCP (Phase P2)
docs.text: Model Context Protocol tools for Cursor / Ollama agents.

docs.title: Planned tools
docs.text: Tool Backend Level get_connectivity_matrix GET /api/v1/matrix L0 list_environments GET /api/v1/environments L0 get_platform_health GET /health L0

docs.title: Forbidden tools (by policy)
docs.text:
• Any direct daemon_control write
  • Any ib:operator:cmd RPC
  • Unauthenticated trade stack mutations

docs.title: Phase 0
docs.text:
Not implemented. Use HTTP against platform-api (:8780) manually or via scripts.

Implementation target: TypeScript or Go MCP server in this directory.
